title: carduus candicans subsp. cylindricus
intro: Carduus candicans subsp. cylindricus, also known as the Cylindrical Cardoon, is a subspecies of the Carduus candicans plant, a type of thistle native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of the Cylindrical Cardoon include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating kidney and urinary tract issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
